title: Typed Async Work, Platform APIs, and Cancellation · Type-System Trace: Promise Types
summary: Coordinate public-data requests, cancellation, retries, and UI state across browser and server boundaries. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts promise types increment in a typed cancellable data coordinator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model promise fulfillment values and rejection handling without pretending rejected types are encoded in Promise.
Locate and replace as, non-null, double assertions, any, and suppression directives with evidence-producing boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
